name: Spec discussion

---

<!--
  Use this for spec questions and clarifications. If you want to *change*
  the spec, file a PIP instead (JP-redacted) see CONTRIBUTING.md "File a PIP".
-->

## Spec reference

Which section / line / file are you asking about?

- `spec/PROTOCOL.md` (JP-redacted) (JP-redacted) (link the heading)
- `spec/capabilities/<name>.cap.v<N>.json`
- `docs/PIPs/PIP-NNN.md`

## The question / ambiguity

Be specific. Quote the exact spec text and say which part you find ambiguous, contradictory, or surprising.

> Quoted spec text here.

## Why it matters

What does an implementer get wrong if this is left ambiguous? A concrete example helps a lot:

```
# example payload / API call that two compliant implementations might handle differently
```

## What you'd propose

One of:

- **Clarification only** (JP-redacted) the spec already implies the answer, just say it explicitly.
- **Behavioural change** (JP-redacted) the spec needs to mandate a different behaviour. (If so, this is probably a PIP candidate (JP-redacted) say why you didn't open one yet.)
- **Don't know yet** (JP-redacted) looking for the maintainers / community to weigh in.

- Related issues / PRs:
- Related PIPs:
- Related implementations you've checked:
